zh.lifeSummary: 當King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond於1142年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特時，他的父親Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain42歲，母親Sadb MacGillapatrick15歲。他和Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster至少有9個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1194年在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克利默里克享年52歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克利默里克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond于1142年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特时，他的父亲Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain42岁，母亲Sadb MacGillapatrick15岁。他和Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster至少有9个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1194年在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克利默里克享年52岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克利默里克。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

Irish:
Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Briain ‘son of Brian’. See O'Brien and Bryan .

nameMeanings.name: Donal
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Earlier Domhnall , from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’.

variants.name: Donall
meanings: Earlier Domhnall , from Old Celtic dubno ‘world’ + val ‘rule’.

nameMeanings.name: Mór
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name from mór ‘large, great’. This was the commonest of all girls’ names in late medieval Ireland, and has continued in use in both Ireland and Scotland to the present day.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond was born in 1142, in Munster, Ireland, his father, Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain, was 42 and his mother, Sadb MacGillapatrick, was 15. He had at least 9 sons and 1 daughter with Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster. He died in 1194, in Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond est né en 1142, à Munster, Irlande, son père, Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Sadb MacGillapatrick, avait 15 ans. Il a eu au moins 9 fils et 1 fille avec Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster. Il est décédé en 1194, à Limerick, County Limerick, Irlande, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Limerick, County Limerick, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond 1142 in Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain 42 und seine Mutter Sadb MacGillapatrick 15. Er hatte mit Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster mindestens 9 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1194 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Limerick, County Limerick, Irland und wurde in Limerick, County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond è nato il nel 1142 nel Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Sadb MacGillapatrick, aveva 15 anni. Lui avuto almeno 9 figli e 1 figlia con Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster. Morì nel 1194, nel Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomondが1142年にアイルランドムンスターで生まれた時，父Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briainは42歳，母Sadb MacGillapatrickは15歳であった。彼はÓrlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinsterとの間に少なくとも9人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1194年にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックリメリックで52歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックリメリックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond(이)가 1142년 아일랜드 먼스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Sadb MacGillapatrick(은)는 15세였다. 그는 Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster(와)과 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1194년 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 라임릭에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 라임릭에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond nasceu em 1142, em Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Sadb MacGillapatrick, tinha 15 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 9 filhos e 1 filha com Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster. Ele faleceu em 1194, em Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond родился в 1142 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Sadb MacGillapatrick, 15. У него было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 1 дочь от Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster. Он умер в 1194 г. в местности лимирикк, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности лимирикк, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

sm.from 1168 to 1194: mai le 1168 e o'o I le 1194

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Donal Mór Toirrdelbaig O'Brien King of Thomond nació en 1142, en Munster, Irlanda, su papá, Toirdhealbhach macDiarmada Ua Briain, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Sadb MacGillapatrick, tenía 15 años. Tuvo por lo menos 9 hijos y 1 hija con Órlaith Nhic "Urlachen" Murchadha of Leinster. Murió en 1194, en Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.
